_comment: KatMUD global layer - applies to every mud, guild, character.
Default numpad movement set (spec 4.1): both NumLock variants
of each key. Any later layer overrides per-keysym.
settings.ntfy_topic enables a push notification on every incoming
tell (phone/web dashboard). Generate your own random slug before
setting it - ntfy.sh public topics are world-readable/writable by
anyone who knows the name: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(16))".
Never commit a real topic value.

speedwalk._comment: single-letter speedwalk map; edit freely, any layer can override per-letter. Anything not listed must be (parenthesized) in a speedwalk.

triggers.pattern: Velica says: The Demoniac Triad is no more.  The world is safe.
Are you the one who slew the Triad?
you must prove your deed to me.
So you are the one who slew Brenan.  Thank you.
So you are the one who slew Raqna.  Thank you.
You have to retreat against the onslaught of fire!
